species: Rickettsialpox is a febrile illness caused by the mite-borne pathogen Rickettsia akari.
disease_state: Rickettsialpox is a febrile illness caused by the mite-borne pathogen Rickettsia akari.
sample_source: sera of patients with confirmed rickettsial infection
Purified recombinant proteins were then separated by SDS-PAGE and probed against five sera from patients with confirmed rickettsial infection.
cell_line: The 44 kDa uncharacterized protein (A8GP63) together with the highly abundant 60 kDa (GroEL) (A8GPB6) and the DnaK (A8GMF9) were prepared by ectopic expression in E.coli BL21(DE3).
strain: R. akari reference strain Hartford was propagated in egg yolk sacs of pathogen-free chicken embryos...
